name: Flames Card
description: You can use this card to summon a devil. The card is attuned to {@filter a specific devil with a challenge rating of 8 or lower|bestiary|source=|Challenge Rating=[&0;&8]|tag=devil|miscellaneous=}. As an action, you can hold this card aloft and summon that devil, which appears in an unoccupied space you can see within 30 feet of you. The devil is initially unfriendly toward you and your companions. Roll initiative for the devil, which has its own turns. The DM has the creature's stat block. On ea
